title: A Full Meal — Restaurant English
description: Ordering a real meal: starter, main, dessert. Substitutions, allergies, paying the bill.
summary_pt_br: Pedir uma refeição completa em restaurante: starter, main, dessert. Pedir substituições, avisar alergias, pedir a conta. Formas educadas: 'Could I have...', 'Without...', 'I'm allergic to...'.

turns.en: Yes — I'll have the soup as a starter, and the fish as a main.
turns.pt: Sim — sopa de entrada e peixe como prato principal.

turns.en: A sparkling water, please. No ice.
turns.pt: Uma água com gás, sem gelo.

turns.en: Oh — I'm allergic to nuts. Could you check with the chef?
turns.pt: Ah — sou alérgico a nozes. Pode checar com o chef?

items.term: Could I get the bill, please?

items.pt: A taxa de serviço está incluída?

exercise.question: You want the bill. Which?
options: Could I get the bill, please?
exercise.explanation: 'Could I get the bill, please?' — polite standard.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Forma educada: 'Could I get the bill, please?'
